mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_product ( store_id, product_id, store_product_price, store_product_status ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{requestDTO.productId}, #{requestDTO.storeProductPrice}, #{requestDTO.storeProductStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT sp.store_product_id, sp.store_id, sp.product_id, hp.product_name, hp.product_category, sp.store_product_price, sp.store_product_status FROM store_product sp JOIN head_product hp ON sp.product_id = hp.product_id WHERE sp.store_id = #{storeId} AND sp.store_product_status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY sp.store_product_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE store_product SET store_product_price = #{requestDTO.storeProductPrice}, store_product_status = #{requestDTO.storeProductStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND store_product_id = #{storeProductId}
